query:
INSERT INTO booking_metrics (user_id, metric_date, occupancy_rate, total_bookings, total_revenue, review_score, total_reviews, page_views, area_avg_occupancy, area_avg_review_score, page_views_vs_competitors)
VALUES 
  (1, CURDATE(), 32.5, 808, 333039, 8.4, 155, 1200, 45.0, 9.1, -72.0),
  (1, DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), 31.8, 805, 332000, 8.4, 153, 1150, 44.5, 9.1, -71.5)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user c2qSkVB4gKtEmor.bc3c8c9ce52a --database VzNbWtRJAsr2zJAegEjRtX --execute INSERT INTO booking_metrics (user_id, metric_date, occupancy_rate, total_bookings, total_revenue, review_score, total_reviews, page_views, area_avg_occupancy, area_avg_review_score, page_views_vs_competitors)
VALUES 
  (1, CURDATE(), 32.5, 808, 333039, 8.4, 155, 1200, 45.0, 9.1, -72.0),
  (1, DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), 31.8, 805, 332000, 8.4, 153, 1150, 44.5, 9.1, -71.5)
